metadata.name: Respond to a Negative Product Review

description: A customer left a 1-star review complaining about a product defect. An agent needs to respond publicly and resolve the issue.

nodes.task_description: Identify the negative review and the customer who wrote it.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the review and the associated customer account.

nodes.task_description: Post a public reply to the review, apologizing for the issue and offering to make it right.

expected_outcome.value: Agent posts a well-worded, empathetic public response.

nodes.task_description: Create a support ticket to proactively contact the customer via email and offer a replacement or refund.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a support ticket to resolve the underlying issue privately.
